candidates.why: Service-related revenue but appears supplementary to the main Revenue line; include as lower-priority fallback.
Primary revenue line with substantial amounts each year; best representation of top-line sales.
Includes Revenue plus Other revenue; useful as an alternative definition of top-line if needed, so included as fallback.
Finance income, not operating revenue; should not be primary but is in candidate list, so kept as very low-priority fallback.
Interest income, not operating revenue; very low-priority fallback only because it is in the provided candidates.
FX income, not core revenue; very low-priority fallback only due to inclusion in candidate list.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Net income measure, not revenue; conceptually incorrect for REVT, should not be used in practice.
Comprehensive income, not revenue; conceptually incorrect for REVT.
Comprehensive income item, not revenue; conceptually incorrect for REVT.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income measure, not revenue; conceptually incorrect for REVT.
Liability for unearned revenue, not the revenue flow; not appropriate for REVT.

variables.notes: Using the main operating revenue line as primary ("Revenue"), with "Total revenues" and "Service Revenue" as fallbacks if the primary is missing in some years.

candidates.why: Direct cost of sales; matches the definition of COGS.
Likely part of operating overhead (SG&A) rather than direct COGS; included in candidate list but not primary choice.
Non-core other income/expense, not COGS.
Non-core other income/expense, not COGS.
Net operating figure, a subtotal including many components; not appropriate as COGS.
Financing cost, not COGS.
FX expenses, financial not operating COGS.
Net financing cost, not COGS.
Non-recurring items, not regular COGS.
Balance sheet liability, not an expense flow; not suitable for COGS.
Balance sheet liability, not an expense flow; not suitable for COGS.

variables.notes: "Cost of Goods Sold" is the clear and direct mapping for COGS; other candidates are overhead, subtotals, or financial items.

candidates.why: Core SG&A personnel expense; clearly an operating overhead component.
Equity-based compensation, typically classified within SG&A; qualifies as an SG&A component.
Balance sheet liability rather than expense; not used as an SG&A expense component.
Equity/reserve adjustment, not an operating SG&A expense.

variables.notes: Using available income statement overhead components: personnel costs and share-based compensation. Other SG&A-like lines (e.g., "Other Operational Costs") exist but are not in the provided candidate list; sticking to candidates keeps mapping unambiguous.

candidates.why: Capitalized development asset, not the period R&D expense; does not match XRD definition.
Gross capitalized development asset; not the R&D expense flow.
Accumulated amortization of capitalized development; not current-period R&D expense line.

variables.notes: No explicit research & development expense line appears in the income statement. Available development-related lines are balance sheet items (capitalized development costs and amortization), which are not appropriate for XRD. Treating XRD as missing (0).

candidates.why: Fair value/remeasurement item, not interest expense; not suitable for XINT.
Primary interest expense line; best match for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest portion of lease liabilities; a component of total interest expense, useful as secondary fallback.
Profit allocation to NCI, not interest expense.
Profit allocation to minority interests, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; tertiary fallback if main interest lines are missing.
Debt balance, not interest expense; not appropriate for XINT.
Debt balance, not expense; not appropriate for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Non-Current Interest Bearing Debt to shareholders
candidates.why: Debt balance, not expense; not appropriate for XINT.
Equity component, not interest expense.
Equity component, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Interest expense is mapped to the main "Interest Expense" line, with lease-related interest lines as fallbacks to capture periods where presentation may differ.

candidates.why: Income statement remeasurement item, not an equity balance; unsuitable for BE.
Component of equity but not total equity; better to use total equity for BE.
Adjusting component within equity; not the full equity measure.
Represents total shareholders' equity; with separate non-controlling interest lines available, this approximates parent equity.
Technical balancing line, not the main equity figure.
Balancing item, not the substantive equity measure.
Balancing item, not the substantive equity figure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing line ensuring the balance sheet equation, not equity itself.
Sum of equity and liabilities; not appropriate for BE.

variables.notes: Using the main "Total equity" line as book equity. Non-controlling interests are reported separately, so BE corresponds to shareholders' equity as needed for PROF.

candidates.why: Remeasurement item, not minority interest; not a match for MIB.
Income statement allocation to NCI; indicates presence of minorities but not the balance sheet interest itself.
Duplicate income statement allocation to minorities; again, not the balance sheet MIB.
Balance sheet line for equity attributable to non-controlling interests; primary mapping for MIB.
Alternative label for non-controlling interests on the balance sheet; useful as fallback.

variables.notes: Mapping minority interest to balance sheet lines for non-controlling interests, with both label variants provided as a priority list to handle presentation changes across years.
